entry.title: Re: Fiscal Year Variant SZ is set in CBC, can we change t...
entry.content:
From a business perspective, it is strongly recommended that the definitions for periods with already existing posting documents be kept the same to ensure consistent period determination.

You can find more detailed information in configuration help for the Maintain Fiscal Year Variants Configuration Step.

Or select the field and press the bottom F1 

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: CAP OData filter parsing
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am looking for a way to convert an OData filter to a CqnPredicate. I would like to have a generic action that takes a filter coming from a UI5 items binding and send this as a payload to my Java CAP CDS action. 
Is there such a functionality that be used programatically ? 

Since this is done automatically for ReadEventContext I would think it exists.

Thank you

entry.title: Report on Changes made to RBP Permission Roles
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to report on all changes made to Permission Roles over a period of +- one year? I have tried to use the Change Audit Report > RBP Role Change Report in SuccessFactors. However, I get an error, "You have exceeded the maximum date range of 31 days".

Is it possible to report on to report on all changes made to Permission Roles over a period of time longer than 31 days?

Thanks

KLV

entry.title: Re: SAP Community issues when posting new blogs
entry.content:
Hi @BobShen, 

Could you please send us an email at community@sap.com?
That way we can ask a few follow-up questions to the issues you have reported. 

Kind regards,
Anne

entry.title: Re: CER006 exam attempts payment instructions

Anne

entry.title: Issue with Field Descriptions After ODP Data Source Replication in BW
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are encountering an issue with the field descriptions after replicating the ODP data source in BW.

We recently added new fields to the data source in ECC and replicated it to BW. While the new fields are available in BW, we’ve noticed that the short and medium descriptions that were previously maintained for these fields are now identical to the long description.

The first image shows the details after replication, and the second image shows the details before replication. For example, the field DATA_TYPE had three different descriptions (short, medium, and long) before replication, but after replication, all descriptions are identical.

We have verified that in ECC, the three different descriptions are correctly maintained.

We are working on SAP NetWeaver 7.5 SP26.

Could someone please assist us in resolving this issue?

Thank you,
Rahul

entry.title: key figure calculation past-current-future logic and from-to period logic
entry.content:
we need to create a calculated key figure (KF) that incorporates the following elements:

  1. Past values of one key figure (KF1).
  2. Present and future values of another key figure (KF2).

This calculated key figure should take in account for these components in its calculation logic. For instance:

At time t, the value of the calculated KF may depend on:

 PASTCURRENTFUTURE
monthmar-24apr-24mag-24giu-24lug-24ago-24set-24ott-24nov-24dic-24gen-25feb-25mar-25apr-25mag-25giu-25lug-25
kf1 1010101010101010101010101010101010
kf2 1010101010101010202020202020202020
k3kf1kf1kf1kf1kf1kf1kf1kf1kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2

for example:

  • KF1(t−1): Past value of KF1 (one period before).
  • KF2(t): Present value of KF2.
  • KF2(t+1): Future value of KF2 (one period ahead)
  • kf3= IF(MONTH>= TODAY; KF2; KF1)

how is possible to use this logic in ibp calculation?

in addiction, is it possible to create ibp calculation with "FROM\TO PERIOD" logic?

 20232024
month123456789101112123456789101112
kf1 101010101010101010101010101010101010101010101010
kf2 202020202020202020202020202020202020202020202020
kf3kf1kf1kf1kf1kf1kf1kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2kf1kf1kf1kf1kf1kf1kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2kf2

the kf3 logic is:

every years from month 1 to month 6 take in account kf1; from moth 7 to moth 12 take in account kf2

How can we create  an IBP calculation like the kf3, that take in account the value of KF1 from month 1 to  month 6 ;from moth 7 to moth 12 take in account kf2 , independent of the year?

thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Execution of OSGi Shell Commands on CPI Runtime Node
entry.content:
It may be useful to analyse the integration  flows bundle
 
integration flow name IF_ESV_test_http

cmd = "bundle:capabilities IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:classes IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:diag IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:headers IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:id IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:info IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:services IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:status IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);
 
cmd = "bundle:tree-show IF_ESV_test_http";
builder << " " << cmd << " ";
builder << execOsgi(message,cmd);

entry.title: Turning off notifications for Validation Rules updates
entry.content:
Hello SAC Community,

for some time I have been meaning to ask you, if any of you know, if there is a possibility in SAC, to turn off notifications that you receive from Validation Rules everytime there is an update in the given Dimension. We have a planning application that allows users to create new members in a Dimension. That Dimension is included in a Validation Rule in the model and everytime we create a new member in the Dimension, we receive the following notification. It is pretty annoying because we create upto 20 new dimension members in one go which creates 20 notifications. We have not found a way to turn these notifications off. Did any of you?

Thank you very much!

Adam Vacek Nekola

entry.title: How to change the partner of a opportunity in customBO?
entry.content:
Hey guys,

I created a new custom BO. There I can read and change data from the customer like this:

 

lr_bezN = gp_von.Relationship.Where(n => n.NodeID == lv_node);
lr_bez = lr_bezN.GetFirst();
if (lr_bez.IsSet() == false){this.status = "3"; return; } //fehler beim verarbeiten
neueBez_NodeData.DistributionChannelCode.content = lr_bez.DistributionChannelCode.content ;
neueBez_NodeData.DivisionCode.content = lr_bez.DivisionCode.content;
neueBez_NodeData.RelationshipBusinessPartnerInternalID = lr_bez.RelationshipBusinessPartnerInternalID;
neueBez_NodeData.RelationshipBusinessPartnerUUID.content = lr_bez.RelationshipBusinessPartnerUUID.content;
neueBez_NodeData.RoleCode.content = lr_bez.RoleCode.content;
neueBez_NodeData.SalesOrganisationUUID.content = lr_bez.SalesOrganisationUUID.content;
var neueBez = gp_to.Relationship.Create(neueBez_NodeData);
if	(neueBez.IsSet()){
}else{
failure = true;
}

 

Now I read all opportunities from a customer

 

var x = gp_von.InternalID;
var OppyVon = Opportunity.QueryByElements;
var OppyVon_SelParams = OppyVon.CreateSelectionParams();
OppyVon_SelParams.Add(OppyVon.PartyPartyKey.PartyID.content, "I", "EQ", x);
var OppyVon_Results = OppyVon.Execute(OppyVon_SelParams);
//my Opportunity
var opportunity2 = OppyVon_Results.Where(n => n.NodeID == lv_node);

 

There are some results, but when I try to change the party from the opportunity..its read only.

When I try to create a opportunity, I got the failure with cross-deployment unit:

Has anybody an idea how to change the customer from the opportunity?

By creating Instance, I got this errors:

KR

entry.title: SF - How to consider several time entries individually with the same time type per day
entry.content:
I have a requirement in the area of SF Time Management. At my client employees can record the time type 'Official Errand' (attendance) multiple times a day in the system. Is it possible for these time entries (time pairs) to be considered individually, with the first 30 minutes of each entry being deducted and thus not counted towards the flextime account?

#SF #Time Tracking

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA EHS Incident Management issue: task created several times.
entry.content:
Dear Community I seek for your help

In SAP S/4HAHA for EHS, Incident Management, OnPrem release 2023, sometimes when creating tasks the app generates am additional line with the exact same task, sometime more. See pic below:

My technical knowledge is rather limited, and I need help to direct an ABAP or "Fiori" consultant towards the right direction. What might be the cause of this behavior?

Note: either repeated task you click through will lead to the same screen and the following behaviors are exactly the same, as in when you close the task, all the repeated lines will show you that - it's just that, repeated lines.

Thank you in advance!

 

Paulo Pinto

entry.title: Re: SAP Personas - Admin question or rather your best pra...
entry.content: I'm not sure where all the parameter settings might be. Perhaps @Tamas_Hoznek knows?

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
entry.content:
• Check you BAdI implementation filter (InfoProvider value)
  • Consider using new BAdI  RSROA_OLAP_BADI (performance)
  • What did you code in INITIALIZE method
  • What is the value of P_KYF_ZVK_STVAL during dump, what is the error?
  • Optimistic code, no check if assign is successful?

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/Key Figures BADI
entry.content: From ABAP side, your ASSIGN statement can't do a short dump, it's only its later use which can do a short dump, e.g. <FS_ZVK_STVAL> = L_EXT_VALUE. Could you tell what structure it is?

entry.title: Re: Content Enricher with Combine and Enrich Aggregation Algorithms in SAP CPI
entry.content: yes its really useful information  you share the data in this page heartly gratitude

entry.title: How KTern.AI is leveraging SAP AI to take their SAP store industry solution to the next level
entry.content:
As SAP moves to include “AI everywhere” and offering platforms and tools like SAP BTP Cloud Foundry environment to the market, it is great to see SAP partners enhancing their solutions with these AI capabilities. 

I have earlier written about the KTern.AI solution, an approved industry cloud solution for the professional services industry which helps customers and implementers collaborate on digital transformation projects like SAP RISE projects. 

KTern.AI has now taken the next step with their solution and included SAP AI platform to accelerate moving custom code from an SAP on-premises world to a “keeping the code clean” world on SAP BTP.  This is done by leveraging special Large Language Models to automate the process.   Read more below.  

Interview with Ratnakumar Nagarajan, Executive Director @ Kaar, Chief Product Officer @ KTern.AI.

Question:  What does your solution do? 
Answer: KTern.AI automation platform accelerates RISE with SAP centric digital transformations with AI-First approach. Over the last 2 decades, enterprise customers have piled up their legacy customizations, leading to longer upgrade cycles, higher maintenance costs and performance inefficiencies. As a pioneering solution, KTern.AI drives clean core modernization with SAP Business AI powered custom code mining in SAP ERP core, optimization & transformation into SAP BTP extensions. It helps enterprises achieve faster innovation cycles, minimal disruptions, improved agility, and long-term cost savings.

Q: How does it work?
A: To drive SAP clean core automation, KTern.AI works with a data-driven, non-invasive, AI-First approach. It connects to the SAP ERP system through standard SAP RFC protocol, scans the data in the SAP system including the as-is custom codes. It performs to-be segmentation into side-by-side SAP BTP extensions and in-app extensions, based on materiality and complexity. To build business apps, KTern.AI offers its inbuilt CodeGenie buildspaces to simulate and generate LLM powered code built on RESTful ABAP Application Programming (RAP) & Cloud Application Programming (CAP) models, with industry best practices. The end-to-end automation built on SAP AI Core powered AWS Bedrock foundational models, accelerates transition to a clean core architecture, ensuring cloud readiness while minimizing manual intervention and reducing technical debt.

Q: How can the system manage to create new code?
KTern.AI generates new code using a specially trained Large Language Model (LLM) designed for SAP environments tapping on SAP Generative AI Hub. This LLM understands the intricacies of SAP’s customizations and generates optimized, cloud-compatible code. The key advantage lies in KTern.AI Hanapedia – SAP Tribal Knowledge Base engine, with reinforced learning capabilities, built on deep industry knowledge from our 15+ years of SAP excellence. It enhances the LLM’s ability to generate relevant & accurate solutions for specific business needs, based on existing custom codes or Functional Requirement Specifications (FRS) document fed as input. Additionally, KTern.AI’s value comes from its automated workflows, intelligent decision-making insights on the overall system landscape, which streamlines the transition and ensure code transformation with a clean core strategy.

Q: How much effort does the customer / partner need to put into checking the outcome?
A: In our experience with Oil & Gas based industry in the US, KTern.AI automated upto 60% of the extensibility assessment and code generation tasks for custom code during their SAP S/4HANA transformation with clean core approach. The platform identified legacy customizations and provided actionable insights, helping customer and system integrator to review and take the final data-driven decisions. Our AI-driven approach ensured accuracy and efficiency, allowing the customer to focus more on strategic decision-making rather than manually interpreting code analysis results, as part of their RISE with SAP led Business Transformation Program.

Q: Which tools and technologies do the solution leverage?
KTern.AI leverages SAP BTP fueled SAP AI Core & Generative AI Hub, that act as the cornerstone of clean core automation. The solution uses proprietary Large Language Models (LLMs) tailored for SAP custom code analysis and transformation into modular applications, ensuring high accuracy in identifying and modernizing legacy customizations. The KTern.AI platform utilizes the SAP AI Launchpad to access AI scenarios, and SAP AI Core to provide an engine to AWS Bedrock foundational models. The SAP AI Core Systems help build the CI/CD pipeline and synchronization across the DevOps & MLOps lifecycle, thanks to the integration with SAP Cloud ALM. With the intelligent tech driven by SAP Business AI, the KTern.AI platform helps you achieve AI-first modernization with code transformation and modularized SAP BTP extensions for increased business productivity and faster innovation cycles.

Q: Can you specify about how you leverage SAP AI Core capabilities and services?
KTern.AI utilizes SAP AI Core service enabled in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry environment for high accuracy and efficiency in outputs. The Generative AI Hub powered AWS Bedrock Claude 3.5 Sonnet model helps perform triangulated complex study of business requirements, custom codes and tribal knowledge base, to generate codes based on RAP & CAP models and build business apps at ease. Thanks to prompt engineering & management capabilities, the Generative AI Hub is the backbone of KTern.AI DevZone – an intelligent, cutting-edge IDE with hybrid intelligence and intuitive data model visualizations.  By using SAP AI Core’s scalable compute resources, KTern.AI efficiently processes large volumes of custom code and drives automation with high accuracy for faster clean core transformations towards a Composable Enterprise. KTern.AI is listed on the SAP Discovery Center, to help SAP customers & partners get onboarded with SAP AI Core services for the  clean core mission.

Q: What is your vision and plans for the solution moving forward?
Our vision is to democratize SAP centric digital transformations with autonomous intelligence. In our pursuit to drive continuous modernization for enterprises with clean core strategy and empower system integrators, KTern.AI intends to deploy autonomous bots with advanced intelligence, to continuously assess, adapt, optimize business applications. Our collaboration with SAP Co-Innovation Labs (COIL) on Generative AI intends to empower 5M+ developers, increase productivity of 300M+ cloud users across 1000+ partners and 40,000+ enterprises in SAP ecosystem. As KTern.AI platform offers the SAP Business AI driven value realization with right use case, it addresses the right tech needs of SAP-run enterprises, that puts business innovation and agility at its core. With 7x times faster SAP innovation cycles and 30% reduced efforts in SAP BTP implementations at the moment, we intend to continuously improve the business outcomes and drive customer success, through Digital Clean Core as a Service (DCaaS) delivery automation model powered by KTern.AI.

Conclusion:
There are so many great aspects of this story which support SAP strategies: leveraging GEN AI to automate business processes, built on SAP BTP AI capabilities, making SAP RISE and other transformations more efficient, and partner-to-partner collaboration for partner ecosystem efficiency!

If you are an organisation running SAP and embarking on a digital transformation journey, consider contacting KTern.AI to leverage their solution.  If you are an SAP partner running SAP RISE projects, consider doing the same.

 Link to KTern.AI on SAP store

More about Kaar:
KTern.AI is an Independent Product division of Kaar Technologies - A global IT firm focused on providing SAP services like SAP ERP Implementation, SAP Upgrade, SAP Rollout, SAP module implementation and SAP Support Services for different verticals in the industry like Oil & Gas, Petrochemicals, Manufacturing, Public Sectors, Engineering & Construction, Transportation, Education, Healthcare, Media and FMCG. With a strong base of 2500 + SAP associates and through many successful ventures and partnerships, Kaar Technologies has completed over 1000 + SAP projects and worked with many reputed organizations world over. KTern.AI is a key pillar in this journey as a 'Digital Transformation as a Service' (DXaaS) automation delivery model which reduces 24% of the effort with hyper automation tapping our tribal knowledge base having two decade years of industry experience

entry.title: Use product lifecycle management in ABC XYZ segmentation
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am exploring part where we need to consider product lifecycle management in ABC segmentation. 

I have assigned myself to user group which is assigned to global configuration to use PLM in ABC segmentation. 

Maintained product assignment Reference product - New Product.

My assumption/Expectation was, when I change ABCID of reference product along with locking indicator, in next ABC/XYZ segmentation run system will assign ABC/XYZ segmentation to new product based on reference product.

I have tried this scenario but everytime system maintains default value and do not consider reference value of ABCID.

Looking for solution to this if anyone has implemented same or tried any alternative aproach to achieve same result ?

entry.title: Re: Migrating from CR9 nowadays
entry.content: Click on Add Assemblies and then Extensions:

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 : Auto resize ?
entry.content: It's always been this way and no one complained so it is what it is....

entry.title: Re: Automating Multi-Sheet Excel Report Creation and Emailing in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing this and for illustrating the use of open-source projects such as abapGit and ABAP2XLSX! This is definitely still a popular requirement in SAP even in 2024. (As a matter of fact, we were discussing exactly this type of request with a colleague just yesterday. 🙂 )

I have to say though that the code examples are a bit behind on what is expected in modern ABAP. For example, use of FAE is highly discouraged. At minimum, when we do that, we need to check if table is not blank. Otherwise you'll get the opposite of good performance. 🙂 And this would've been picked up by a code check. I'd encourage you to run at minimum Extended Check on all the code you write (it's available right in ABAP Editor) or, better yet, use ATC.

There are different thoughts about Hungarian notation but at minimum, just stick with one naming approach: either use HN or not. Mixing different conventions is the worst. Please take a look at Clean ABAP for recommendations on this.

I also highly recommend this cheat sheet to help modernizing the code: https://www.brandeis.de/en/blog/cheat-sheet-modern-abap-en

E.g. CREATE OBJECT and CALL METHOD are no longer needed (for 10 years already probably) and inline declarations are very useful to avoid "the wall of DATA" in every block. (I think there are so few systems running on pre-7.4 ABAP these days that we can stop focusing on the code samples for the old releases.) There are also some guidelines in ABAP documentation but I'd recommend the resources above first.

Cheers!

entry.title: RE-Fx flow type involved when a contract is interrupted before the end date
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 

we would like to be sure to have all the needed Flow type customized in our system, so I am writing to ask which is the proper one the system will trigger in case of an interruption during the life the contract life?  That means the contract"s life is stopped before its end date. In this case we expected a loss due to asset retirement so the Flow type should manage the Lease Debit versus Loss gl account. 

Thanks a lot in advance for your smart support

Regards

Donatella

entry.title: Re: Unable to create ABAP project in ECLIPSE IDE
entry.content: open the sap gui first, and maintain entry there.

entry.title: Crystal Reports SP 33 Runtime ASP.NET Integrated security
entry.content:
I'm using Crystal reports runtime 33 in ASP.NET for the first time, last version that we used was 21. The reports connection it's with SQL Server and the code used:

Dim cnnInfo As CrystalDecisions.Shared.ConnectionInfo = New ConnectionInfo()
With cnnInfo
.ServerName = "(local)"
.DatabaseName = "MYDB"
.IntegratedSecurity = True
End With

Call SetDBLogonForReport(cnnInfo, fCR)
Call SetDBLogonForSubReport(cnnInfo, fCR)

The problem is that Crystal Reports always tries to connect to the database using the IIS Application Pool identity instead of the impersonated user. Impersonation doesn't work.

Runtime versions from (SP21) to (SP25) works fine.

Impersonation doesn't work for report with Crystal Reports (sp26) and higher.

Does anybody knows why? What I need to change to impersonation works?

entry.title: Re: Setup activity missing for a sub-operation in PDS |CURTO_SIMU|
entry.content: Hi Chetan,Check for warning messages, error messages when you run Curtoadv_create. If all the data is transferred, check some basic master data settings if resource used is marked as advance planning resource or not.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create ABAP project in ECLIPSE IDE
entry.content: Hi junwu, i am new to sap. I don't have any sap gui. So if possible can you please provide any link to download the sap gui.

entry.title: Re: ABAP 7.5x Quick Reference
entry.content:
It's not a comprehensive list focused on specific version but I think many developers will find this short form useful too: https://www.brandeis.de/en/blog/cheat-sheet-modern-abap-en

I refer to it almost daily because I can never remember all the new syntax and where exactly parenthesis and punctuation go. 🙂

entry.title: Re: SFC Card Core Plugin Extension Events Issue
entry.content:
Hi! For Sfc Card plugin, the supported events are:

  • onSelectionChangeEvent()
  • onQuantityChangeEvent()
  • onPageChangeEvent()
  • refreshHeaderInformation()

As docummented at https://github.com/SAP-samples/digital-manufacturing-extension-samples/blob/main/documentation/jsdocs/tutorial-b_sfcCardPlugin.html and implemented as an example at https://github.com/SAP-samples/digital-manufacturing-extension-samples/blob/main/dm-coreplugin-extensions/plugins/webapp/sfcCardExtensionProvider/PluginEventExtension.js

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: How to get rid of the dot next to the sequence owner in a SQL statement
entry.content:
Hello,

For the creation of sequences, I need to define an OWNER for it:
alter sequence myUSER.mySEQUENCE owner to myUSER;

I have coded in the resource file, in SCRIPT / OBJECTS / SEQUENCE / AFTER_CREATE:
alter sequence [%QUALIFIER%]%SQNC% owner to %.13:QUALIFIER%;\n

The "." is always generated after %QUALIFIER% if the owner length is less than 13! How can I ensure it is never generated?

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get rid of the dot next to the sequence owner...
entry.content:
Hello,

The code '(%.13:QUALIFIER%)' extracts the first 13 characters of the variable '%QUALIFIER%', which corresponds to the value of the user code plus the period (.) in the dot notation.
To meet your requirements, you should use 'alter sequence [%QUALIFIER%]%SQNC% owner to %Owner.Code%' instead.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Cannot install Booster - SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed.
entry.content:
Instead of enabling the integration suite booster, assign the following roles manually to trail user:

PI_Read_Only, PI_Business_Expert, PI_Integration_Developer and PI_Administrator

entry.title: Re: Upgrade Mobile Application Integration Framework (MAIF) using SAP Note Transport-based Correctio
entry.content:
Hi Philip, 

We are in the process of building the TCI notes and we will publish once the testing is complete. Please expect all TCI notes be ready sometime in December. We will release these notes when they are available by landscape, starting with S/4HANA 2023. 

Thanks

Syam

entry.title: Re: Issue creating Template in SAP Cloud Appliance
entry.content:
Hello,

Your subscription is limited to 4 cores. You can check this limit in Azure portal. I'm not sure you can change it for a free account.
Those limits are just a quota - you don't pay for them until you start using them. However to create the appliance you need 44.

About the IP - it is restriction which IPs will be allowed to access the appliance. It is in CIDR format and 0.0.0.0/0 means allowed for everybody.
This could be changed later too.

Regards,
Nikola

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello @3Dianjo,

Could you please confirm that you are validating constant 401HC on view V_T511P?
As you already have note 3470796 delivered by support package on your system, it should already be there.

Thank you,
Carlos

entry.title: Partner Determination for Item proposal does not function correctly
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

Can anyone tell me if we can use partner assignment to Item Proposal?

In SPRO,  I am able to Assign Partner determination procedure "TA" to Document Type "PV" at header level and procedure "N" to Item category "PVN" at item level.

However after creating Item Proposal (VA51) and then trying to click on Partners Tab in change mode (VA52),  get following error. 

FB call: insufficient parameters

Message no. VP107

Has anyone used partner determination for Item Proposal before?

Thanks,

Girish

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: EWM inbound delivery not getting created against purc...
entry.content: Hi Rashid ji , Many thanks for the reply. point 1 . This is correct as I stated in my problem statement that other delivery(means processing via EWM is working ) point 2 . if a delivery itself not created in EWM and in S4 it is distributed Delivery where you can enter this info.

entry.title: Re: EWM inbound delivery not getting created against purc...
entry.content: Again the issue is only for purchaser order NB with item category C. The same material I can process other ways via EWM

entry.title: stdavailablecapacityisvalid field cannot be cleared for First Interval in Work center.
entry.content:
Hi All,
I am currently working on developing work center module using SAP Core Data Services(CDS).I am referring the API document by SAP.
https://api.sap.com/api/OP_WORKCENTER_0001/path/post_WorkCenterCapacity__WorkCenterInternalID___WorkCenterTypeCode___CapacityCategoryAllocation___CapacityInternalID___Interval

I am facing some difficulties on Interval and Shifts section there.

As you know, we are having Create, Copy, Change Operations. 
For create operation, there is no issue in interval and shifts. 
If am trying to Copy from an existing work center, in intervals section, am getting an error like:

"stdavailablecapacityisvalid field cannot be cleared for First Interval",

My payload structure for _Interval is as follows:

entry.title: BP sensitive data change workflow
entry.content:
Dear all, 

For a client project, we need to implement a Business Partner workflow for changes in sensitive fields such as bank account information. Is there a possibility to accomplish this using SAP standard or through a BTP Package ? We don't want to use MDG BRF+.

SAP provides the following package for BP creation, but I couldn't find a package for business partner changes: 

  • https://api.sap.com/package/businesspartnercreationapprovalprocess/overview
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/business-partner-creation-approval-process-using-sap-workflow-management/ba-p/13517727

Thank you in advance for for your help. 

Achraf

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Change Text interpretation runtime is...
entry.content: Thanks Yeun, I asked R&D to confirm again and they said it did not work. Thanks for testing again and confirming it's not working as you first indicated. I asked them for an Enhancement request to disable the justification option when converting to HTML so it stops the confusion. As suggested, use HTML Tag's to set the justification in your data, CR will always left justify.

entry.title: Subtotals in Conditions
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

Could you please tell me and deeply explain why there are not subtotals (net price subtotal and effective price) for temporary conditions in the calculation schema?

Kendel Ibarra - SAP MM Student

entry.title: Re: Regarding %_hints oracle '&max_in_blocking_factor 100&&max_blocking_factor 100&' statement
entry.content: If we change the DB, the hint will just be ignored. The second keyword is the name of the DB in the hint.

entry.title: An error occurred while communicating with the OData server to retrieve metadata.
entry.content:
Hello, Specialist!

After creating the application in the program /MERP/CORE_CPMS_APPCREATE_PROG, we encountered the following issue:

When accessing the application via QR code, it returns a persona error with the following log message:
"Error caused by: [-100010] Retrieve metadata failed because the OData server returned HTTP code 403, with message: Access denied to system xxxxx. In case this was a valid request, ensure to expose the system correctly in your cloud connector."

Additionally, some other errors were observed. We are currently using version 2205, which was configured in Syclo; however, the application seems to be pulling information from version 2405.

Thank you in advance for your support

entry.title: EC Compensation information API to receive and display salary data
entry.content:
Dear community, 

we have SF-EC with integration to a third-party-payroll system - ECP is not in place. All salary data is maintained in that system. There is a requirement to replicate certain salary data from the third-party-payroll system into SF in order to display them in Compensation Information portlet. The Compensation Information standard API seems to only support "Get" operation what means (in my understanding) that data can only be received from SF but not replicated into. 

Is that correct and does someone know other opportunities to cover this requirement?

Thank you and kind regards, 

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 : The document could not be opened
entry.content:
Got the reports... Thank you

I know why but I can't explain why sometimes they seem to work.

Also noted is the report history is current versions of CRD, it's not the original report or they are so old there is no history:

The first error is:

@txtpckdes : Used: 0 times'End'
Error in formula :
... text removed for privacy ....
UFL 'u2ltext' that implements this function is missing.

That UFL was one used in CR 7 and was located in c:\windows\Crystal. CR updated the UFL text functions and built them into the Designer so the UFL was no longer used/needed nor was it installed with later versions of CR or higher.

Customer needs to fix their reports and delete the Formula fields that used them. note it's not used so if they are not using the formula then delete them.

The next error is in a current UFL:

NOTE: You and I may get this error because we don't have the UFL the customer is using so when we view the report it will cause errors.

If they go into the Formula Editor and expand this they can see what the UFL name is:

The next error is likely due to we don't have the U212 UFL either.

@INTITULES : Used: 0 times'End'
Error in formula :... text removed for privacy ....
UFL 'u212itext.dll' that implements this function is missing.

Same as above, fix or delete the formula.

There are others so no need to list them here, likely the customer needs to fix the reports.

And as you noted there are references to Database fields that do not exist:

@Codbardivpren : Used: 0 times'End'
Error in formula :
... text removed for privacy ....
This field name is not known.
Details: errorKind

Typical because the DBA may have modified the Tables used and deleted them. CR keeps a copy of the fields used in the Reports at the time of creation.

Same can happen if they add fields to the DB.

So once again the owners of the reports needs to fix them by clicking on each formula and then the X+2 button to verify the formula. It will either error indicating the field is not found or a Field Mapping UI will pop up for the user to repoint the offending field and they are able to redirect it to a new field.

And as noted for the UFL if the formula is not required then just delete the formula.

There is no button you can you do to fix them all at once, someone is going to have to open each report and fix them manually.

You can explain to the Customer that CR Designer is a design tool so it does allow Report Designers to save "bad" references. For example the designer was half way through a formula and it was time to go home so they just saved the report intending to "fix" it later, but then forgot to...

Same with the database updates, likely someone never told them they can't update the Database without updating the Reports by clicking Database... Verify Database. It's the nature of CRD, CRD always "assumes" when the reports are saved they are 100% accurate....

To sum up:

Have the customer check their reports and UFL's used, if the Formulae fields are not used then delete them. Be sure to back up all Report first just in case.

Check with their DBA to verify those missing fields are removed and/or it's possible for security reasons, CRD fully supports DB security, if the User running the reports does not have specific permissions to view the report accessing restricted tables they will get a Database error.

Hope that helps.

Don

entry.title: Re: Generic Object Services (GOS) Attachments for Business Partner - Version 2
entry.content:
Hi Andi,

nice to see you blogging here 🙂 I recently had an issue with a custom GOS implementation that used an explicit COMMIT. This resulted in a OS_COMMIT_TOP_FAILED Dump, but only in BP transactions. Other transactions seemed running just fine.

Turned out that by deferring the COMMIT using "in update task" I was able to circumvent this.

That being said, Do you by chance know how I would have needed to deal with the issue, had I not being able to defer the explicit COMMIT? I read about Object Services but admit that it seems a rather exotic framework ;)#

Cheers

Jens

entry.title: EBS Search String Target field for Payment order in S/4HANA not working, can anyone help
entry.content:
hello there,

I am trying to configure a Search string for a payment order which comes from F110 but so far now lack. There is not much information on this topic specifically to Payment Order and even more specific what is the target field I can use. 

The payment order I can see in field REGUP-VBLNR, but unsure what target field I should select in order to read the payment order, and post the amount against the order and so I can achieve automatic clearing, rather having to go through F-53 and do it manually.

your help would be most appreciated, the posting rule I am using is 

Do you see anything wrong here, A100 is my main bank account

here you can see the Search string 

 

I have tried using Interpretation algo 29 - Payment Order, but that is not working the result i get is this

To me it seems I am not using the correct target field, but I have tried most available, Eternal Ref, etc the same result.

I would like to achieve automatic clearing of the Payment Order, using the MT940 Bank Statement filed 86

Thank you in advance, I am on S/4HANA on premise version but should not matter

#SAP #Searchstring #Paymentorder

entry.title: Re: Issue Bank Guarantee – Trade Finance – Treasury - TRM
entry.content:
Hi all, I wonder, why for the postings the charge is relevant but not the fee which is linked to the bank guarantee. For that a payment is done, but it does not show up in the posting. Instead in the Cash Flow the fee has the comment: Payment without posting. What is the purpose for this?

Regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: How to Edit Multiple Selected Items Individually in a...
entry.content:
@ArianH

build your own fragment and use your selected lines. You can trigger it by table toolbar buttons:

entry.title: Re: Issue creating Template in SAP Cloud Appliance
entry.content:
Hello 

1. Correct If I have 4 cores , I would have to find a Deployment that uses that 4 cores. So likely the free acccount can not offer that.

2. About the IP's to insert:
2.1 Which IP to write Private or Public?
2.2 are  these Ip's to assign to the deployment , for example If I put 192.168.30.50 Is this Ip for the S4HANA machine? or
2.3 The Range of IP is for the machines that can connect to the deployment

entry.title: Dynamic YoY Story Calculation - SAC
entry.content:
Hello,
I need to calculate YoY for YTD, QTD, and MTD. Since my reports are dynamic, it's essential to display the period at the top of the table. This makes it impractical to create restricted calculations like "QTD Current" & "QTD Previous."

I’ve used an advanced filter to set up a dynamic period (see below), but I’m unsure how to create a dynamic YOY comparison (restricted?) calculation. I need both a percentage and an amount difference. (Using the "YOY" formula in the measure, only works for yearly values.)

also, I don't want to use a "client calculation" on the table because it will require to recreate it every month/quarter/year as the time passes.

How can I achieve this?

Thanks

entry.title: Operation Reporting API - Default Filter for Full Access
entry.content:
Hi,

We are having issues with Filter, Could you please help.

Requirement is we should be able to filter by UniqueNames, but optional. if we don't provide UniqueNames, other date filter should be applied.

Question:

Is it must to maintain "UniqueNames" in the filter expression when creating View Template?

if not, how to use filter for Unique Names.

if yes, how to provide default value in viewtemplate which should pull everything (Like "*" in SELECT Statement)

Example syntax:

       {
            "name": "UniqueName",
            "field": "UniqueName",
            "op": "=",
            "defaultValue": "*"
        }  

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
entry.content: The structure for <FS_ZVK_STVAL> = L_EXT_VALUE is C_S_DATA.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
entry.content: BAdI RSROA_OLAP_BADI is not available to me in the current support pack the company is on. InfoProvider is correct. Inititalize code is standard except for an if statement at the top. method IF_EX_RSR_OLAP_BADI~INITIALIZE. IF I_S_RKB1D-COMPID IS NOT INITIAL AND I_S_RKB1D-COMPID = 'ZQ_TD_0IC_MP04_Q002'. DATA: l_global_name TYPE string. FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_global> TYPE i, <l_s_sfc> TYPE rrkg_s_sfc, <l_s_sfk> TYPE rrkg_s_sfk. * there's no need to change this method * Just create attributes for each characteristic * with name P_CHA_<characteristic> TYPE i. * and constants for each key figure with name * P_KYF_<key figure> TYPE i. CLASS cl_exm_im_rsr_olap_badi DEFINITION LOAD. * get field postions for characteristics in structure LOOP AT i_th_sfc ASSIGNING <l_s_sfc> WHERE user_exit NE rrke_c_mode-none. * field name in structure is keyreturnnm * name of the global variable CONCATENATE 'P_CHA' <l_s_sfc>-chanm INTO l_global_name SEPARATED BY '_'. * fill the global variable UNASSIGN <l_global>. ASSIGN (l_global_name) TO <l_global>. CHECK <l_global> IS ASSIGNED. <l_global> = cl_exm_im_rsr_olap_badi=>get_field_position_d( i_fieldnm = <l_s_sfc>-keyreturnnm i_s_data = i_s_data ). ENDLOOP. LOOP AT i_th_sfk ASSIGNING <l_s_sfk> WHERE value_returnnm IS NOT INITIAL. * field name in structure is keyreturnnm * name of the global variable CONCATENATE 'P_KYF' <l_s_sfk>-kyfnm INTO l_global_name SEPARATED BY '_'. * fill the global variable UNASSIGN <l_global>. ASSIGN (l_global_name) TO <l_global>. CHECK <l_global> IS ASSIGNED. <l_global> = cl_exm_im_rsr_olap_badi=>get_field_position_d( i_fieldnm = <l_s_sfk>-value_returnnm i_s_data = i_s_data ). ENDLOOP. ENDIF. endmethod.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
entry.content: The value of P_KYF_ZVK_STVAL during dump is a structure. I did have a check in before to check the field symbol type. It doesn't dump in BW production. It just continues to the next record.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/Key Figures BADI
entry.content: Here is the Define section:method IF_EX_RSR_OLAP_BADI~DEFINE. data: l_s_chanm type rrke_s_chanm, l_t_chanm type rrke_t_chanm, l_s_kyfnm type rsd_kyfnm, l_t_kyfnm type rsd_t_kyfnm. IF I_S_RKB1D-COMPID IS NOT INITIAL AND I_S_RKB1D-COMPID = 'ZQ_TD_0IC_MP04_Q002'. case i_s_rkb1d-infocube. when '0IC_MP04'. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0MATERIAL'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0PLANT'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0BATCH'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0VENDOR'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0WBS_ELEMT'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0MATERIAL__0MATL_TYPE'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0PLANT__0COUNTRY'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. * l_s_chanm-chanm = '0DF_SOBKZ'. * l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. * append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. * clear l_s_chanm. * clear l_s_kyfnm. * l_s_kyfnm = '0TOTALSTCK'. ** l_s_kyfnm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. * append '0TOTALSTCK' to C_T_KYFNM. ** clear l_s_kyfnm. ** l_s_kyfnm = 'ZVK_STVAL'. *** l_s_kyfnm-mode = rrke_c_mode-no_selection. * key figure REFRESH c_t_kyfnm. CLEAR l_s_kyfnm. l_s_kyfnm = 'ZVK_STVAL'. APPEND l_s_kyfnm TO c_t_kyfnm. CLEAR l_s_kyfnm. endcase. ENDIF. endmethod.

entry.title: Re: Unify your process and task mining insights: How SAP UEM by Knoa integrates with SAP Signavio
entry.content: Is SAP going to acquire and embedd KNOA in C/4HANA and Signavio next year, since it will be a strategic decision for customers as well in terms of ROI and TCO long term?

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA public cloud business user creation questions
entry.content:
What are the differences and limitations between the SCIM API and the Business User SOAP service for creating business users? Based on the documentation, both seem capable of creating business users, provided the worker ID is already present and passed. However, are there specific limitations to consider? Additionally, is there any indication that SAP plans to deprecate the SOAP-based service in favor of SCIM?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA public cloud business user creation quest...
entry.content:
• SCIM is an industry standard, i.e. SAP will be focusing more on the SCIM interface in future.
  • Both services (SCIM and SOAP) can create business users and assign business roles. The difference is:
    • the SCIM interface can additionally create business user groups
    • the SOAP interface can only assign business user groups

Currently there are no plans to retire the SOAP service because it has too many different consumers.

entry.title: Error when checking package SMLT - Language installation
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We are attempting to install the languages PL (Polish), FR (French), and IT (Italian) in our SAP BW (7.50) environment with EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 / NW7.50 (ERP 6.18).

Following the official SAP notes 330104 - Transport requests used for language delivery // SRx, for downloading the required DVDs for the languages, and the official note 3129901 - Which language is contained in each language media for EHP8 for SAP ERP 6.0?, we proceeded to download the required DVDs for installing the new languages.

We followed the steps in the official SAP guide by activating the new languages in transaction I18N System Configuration and then adding the files FRSAPKLFR618GAERP608F0.PAT (French), ITSAPKLIT618GAERP608F0.PAT (Italian), and PLSAPKLPL618GAERP608F0.PAT (Polish) to the path /usr/sap/trans/EPS/in/ at the OS level. Afterward, I accessed transaction SMLT, went to Language > Special Actions > Import Support Packages, and upon importing the package, it is detected with an error:

...

Package State: 0001, System State: 0020
Check Component WEBCUIF
Package State: 0001, System State: 0019
Package State: 0001, System State: 0019
Error when checking package

(see log file attached for entire log)

In principle, these are the packages that should be used, but I do not understand the reason for the error.

I located the following SAP note 2689175 - You got "Error when checking package" when you install some language packages, where it indicates our error and the following resolution: 

2 - For cause 2, choose the correct language package or upgrade the support package in the target system to the proper release.

What packages do we need to launch the installation?

Regards, 

Chanchai T.

entry.title: Re: How to change Time zone in Cloud ALM.
entry.content:
Hello,

Since Oct 16, 2024 it is possible to configure the Time Zone for Email and Chat Notifications in Intelligent Event Processing.

You can specify the time zone for email and chat notifications. When configured, the reporting time stamps in the notifications for Send Email to and Send Chat Notification event actions are displayed in the configured time zone.

To configure the time zone,

  1. Open the Intelligent Event Processing app.

  2. Navigate to Configuration  Application Settings  Time Zone.

  3. Select the preferred time zone in the Time Zone for Email and Chat Notifications dropdown.

  4. Choose Save.

For more information on configuring application settings, refer Application Settings.

You can check it further on KBA 3337151 - SAP Cloud ALM for Operations alert e-mails appear delayed when comparing alert/metric timestamps with value in the source service/system

entry.title: Users who are no longer IT Contacts receive Email Notifications from SAP
entry.content:
Users who are no longer IT Contacts receive Email Notifications from SAP about planned and unplanned downtimes, as well as customer communication notifications from SAP.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Users who are no longer IT Contacts receive Email Not...
entry.content:
When an IT contact is created, they do not receive email notifications from SAP; after an IT contact is created, they must subscribe to the CSNS to receive the notifications.

As CSNS is designed as a self-service system, creation of IT contact is not directly proportionate to the subscription. If the user is no longer an IT contact, then they must unsubscribe from CSNS in order to stop receiving SAP E-mail notifications.

If you have an s-user, please directly unsubscribe from unwanted email notifications in me.sap.com as shown below.

If you do not have an s-user, please contact your Super Admin.

IMPORTANT NOTE:

  1. For IT contacts, it is mandatory to subscribe for CSNS once the Email ID is maintained under contact type. Else the customer will not receive any notifications from SAP.
  2. Users who have S-User ID can access CSNS.
  3. Customer can access CSNS from  SAP for Me or Cloud Availability Center or CSNS Direct Link.
  4. CSNS is designed as self-service, so the customer will have to maintain it or remove it from their end.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
Re: chaRM functionality road map on Cloud ALM

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Wien 05.12.2024
entry.content:
Ein gemütlicher Abend in lockerer Runde - zum zwanglosen Austausch über Themen rund um SAP und mehr.
Von der SAP Community, für die SAP Community

Tritt der Gruppe Wien bei und subscribe den Blog-Post SAP Stammtisch Wien, um über zukünftige Events informiert zu werden!

entry.title: Re: Character are doubled when exporting Report to PDF wi...
entry.content:
That is odd, Ubuntu is a Linux font so it's odd that CR would even find it.

Are you running CR Designer in a Windows image on Linux?

All CR fonts must be TTF fonts, sounds like they are doing something strange.

As noted, don't use that font...

A quick Google search doesn't find and font names Ubuntu for windows, it does find how to install Windows fonts on Linux.

CR will try to embed the font into the PDF, one way to check is open the exported PDF and click on Properties...Fonts. it should show you what font it is and/or if font substitutions are being applied.

entry.title: Re: Payment order clearing with EBS in SAP
entry.content: I am also on the same boat, I can not get the 029 Payment order String to clear my blocked document. Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Error when checking package SMLT - Language installation
entry.content: You should compare with your "installed software component versions". You have shown only the "installed product versions", it's meaningless here.

Can you please let us know regarding Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planner App and in detail about all the integrations that needs to be done for this app.

Regards,

Preethi.

Best 

Gianluca

entry.title: Re: Migrating from CR9 nowadays

entry.title: Re: Dispatcher Reminder (BusinessProcessSteps) in Query and Business rules
entry.content:
I see!
You can try querying the businessProcessStepAssignments of your Activity (i.e., businessProcessStepAssignments[0]), and check its value by looking at the "completed" property (i.e., businessProcessStepAssignments[0].completed), either true or false.

entry.title: Re: Feasibility of Attaching Document in Mail Notificatio...
entry.content:
Hi @SatishPanda ,

Based on your request I've found below KBA:

2615287 - Unable to add Attachment Field to Alert Message - https://me.sap.com/notes/2615287/E

Unfortunately above KBA informs that attachments are not allowed on alert messages, but it suggests that it's possible to host a file on your behalf through PLT Product support Team, and then put the URL into your alert.

Please check all the information contained in the KBA and confirm if this works for you.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner Duplicate Check
entry.content:
I've had a really long search before i've found this blog. Thanks so much for this. 

Wish SAP can find a way to better reference these kind of blogs in Google. 

Cheers.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Sphere - Replication Flow
entry.content:
@sharmaar I believe the space would not be considered while loading data via replication flow.

There are two ways i could think at the moment.

1. Import all the data including Null values to a local table, after that filter the null values in a graphical view.

2. If we need to import the data without NULL at beginning step, data flow would be another option to filter the data with a projection as shown below

Hope this helps.

thanks

Lokesh

entry.title: How to access custom semantic tags created and attached with FSV in custom analytical report.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created new Semantic tag group, semantic tags and attached them to GL accounts in FSV created.

Now when I am  trying to use them in custom analytical query in the restricted measure Semantic tag field, unable to find semantic tags created by me, I can see standard values here.

whether I am missing any step? Why custom tags are not appearing in analytical query?

entry.title: Re: how to implement to method IF_EX_FAGL_COND_ACC_ASSIGN...
entry.content:
Hi @raymond_giuseppi 

I implemented this enhancement, but it is not called by the transaction fagl_it_02

the badi is the one you told me: FAGL_COND_ACC_ASSIGNMENT

entry.title: Re: Last Used Date for a Procedure in SAP HANA
entry.content:
As a starting point, would this work for you

select statement_string, last_execution_timestamp, * 
from M_SQL_PLAN_CACHE
where upper(statement_string) like 'CALL%CHESSBOARD%';

assuming you call procedures via the `CALL` statement and the schema in this example is the `CHESSBOARD`.

Greetings

Björn

entry.title: Re: Node JS Recursive Hierarchy Support and Fiori Tree Ta...
entry.content: same question on my part, is there a plan?

entry.title: IBP Inventory Optimization: Optimization Horizon
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I've been testing the optimization horizon setting in the Inventory Profile. According to the SAP Help then the  Optimization Horizon is: "... the time period (in weeks) from which forecast inputs are used in your inventory optimization plans".

Based on that I was expecting some sort of fixed safety stock, or repetition of the recommended safety stock outside of the optimization horizon (while within the planning horizon). But when I change the Optimization Horizon, then I'm getting vastly different results, also on the very short term (week 1 and forward).

I understand that if I set the optimization horizon to less than the flow-through lead time, then no demand/std dev will be propagated through the network.

But for a product with 4 weeks of flow-through lead time, I experience different results on recommended safety stock if I choose 52 or 104 weeks Optimization Horizon (Planning Horizon = 104) - the result differs with about 20%.

Can anyone explain how I should interpret the Optimization Horizon, and how come it has such a big impact on even short term recommendation?

entry.title: Re: Behavior of Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation after Clearing
entry.content:
Dear @Anoop_Kandathil_Jose , 

thanks for your comment and Advanced Valuation related question. 

Since the Advanced Valuation is not integrated into the clearing process, the statistical posting is required for further reporting purposes. We already started to analyze possible scenarios to avoid the statistical posting. If a concrete plan has been made it will be shared on the SAP Roadmap Explorer. 

Thanks for your interests in Advanced Valuation. 

Thank you,

Kevin

entry.title: Re: OOPS! we faced an issue processing your request in DM...
entry.content:
Did you try adding Document Management Service, Repository Option entitlement?

https://help.sap.com/docs/document-management-service/sap-document-management-service/onboarding-repository

entry.title: Re: Use product lifecycle management in ABC XYZ segmentation
entry.content: As I understand it, then the system will use the reference product data along with the products data it self, in order to calculate and determine the ABC/XYZ value - not transfer the MD from the reference to the new.

entry.title: Re: Behavior of Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation after Clearing
entry.content:
Dear @S0025222448 , 

in the example AR is used as the maintained reconciliation account of the BP. Hence, the system will similar to postings made onto AP accounts.

If I interpret your sentence " [...] the final valuation system is NOT clearing the remaining open items (delta posting) on AP / AR accounts from previous valuations." correctly: This will not happen, all previous valuation postings will remain, even after the clearing. This is the purpose of the delta posting logic (compared to the reversal posting logic). We talked to some customers which didn't agree at first, but with the individual account determination in the Advanced Valuation related customizing we could meet the customer requirements. Please take this into consideration.

Thank you for your interest in the Advanced Valuation, we really appreciate that. 

Kind regards, 

Kevin

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan Scheduling Parameters explained + examples
entry.content: Top, great job.
